planning_mode_tours_tooltip: If data is too granular, day planning may no longer be possible.
mark_as_done_box_content: This also creates offers as suggestions.
share_article_harvest_planing_shares: bold&green: in harvest forecast, normal&green: in stock
final_column: approved: no internal program logic follows, only for control.
final_column_offers: approved: offer can be sent to resellers or downloaded.
forecast_classification: If crate sizes are assigned in the harvest forecast, they will be shown here with a light yellow background if not yet classified.
additional_theoretical_purchase: This amount will be added or subtracted from the calculated amount.
additional_theoretical_harvest: This amount will be added or subtracted from the calculated amount.
additional_theoretical_wash_amount: This amount will be added or subtracted from the calculated amount.
additional_theoretical_clean_amount: This amount will be added or subtracted from the calculated amount.
needed_harvesting_crates: Here you can see how many and which harvest crates are needed in the field.
invoice_creation: Invoice for this delivery note. Delivery note will be finalized. If the invoice should cover multiple delivery notes, go to --> Invoices. e-PDF will be created with Zugferd-XML = electronic invoice.
crates_in_orders: For an order, the required crates are calculated automatically here, but can be adjusted manually.
offer_creation_button: Offers are created from the harvest forecast minus the demand already planned for shares. If offers already exist for this week (manually entered or copied from previous week), only additional suggestions will be created. For multiple offer groups, each group has the total amount as available quantity. Please adjust if necessary.
modal_toggle: Inline <-> Modal; not possible for all pages.
delivery_station_day: Here you can see the occupied / total capacity of the delivery station on this day. If 100% is already occupied here, no further shares can be booked with this delivery day, unless they have a different delivery station day.
csv_export_harvest: Here the harvest is exported jointly for all storage locations.
capacity: This is the capacity of the harvest shares (i.e. the vegetable share, and the fruit share if separate); supplementary shares are not counted here, because it is assumed that they are packed into the crates as well.
set_current_stock_as_expected: If the amount is negative, it will be set to 0.
price_per_unit_offers: If the price is orange, it was manually changed and differs from the prices stored for the articles.
pickup_list_whole_day: All pickup lists for all delivery stations of this delivery day.
pickup_list_single_delivery_station: Pickup list for one delivery station
pickup_list_whole_week: All pickup lists for all delivery stations for the whole week
create_summary_invoice_for_selected: Combines multiple delivery notes into one invoice.
finalize_invoices: Finalization is irreversible. In case of an error: reversal. A finalized invoice is automatically sent to the recipient and the accounting department if the corresponding emails are stored.
explainer_csv_template: This template can be used to upload larger amounts of data directly. The first two rows indicate which fields are required, the third row indicates which data type.
name_for_member_pages: Appears for members in the crate content as information about who the purchase comes from. Only shown if configured that way in the settings.
crates_used_in_invoice: Please enter returned empties with a negative quantity.
default_movement_unit: The default unit is always suggested as default, but can always be overwritten.
additional_pickup_days: Number of additional pickup days; Example: delivery day = MON, but can also be picked up TUE --> Entry: 1
share_option_active_entries: If there are active entries, this cannot be changed.
capacity_share_type_variations: Capacity determines how many of this share size can be subscribed simultaneously. If the field is left empty, it is unlimited.
send_offers_button: Only approved offers will be sent.
member_number: The member number is assigned automatically when the member is approved.
manual_transfer_toggle: Click to transfer already-existing members. The entry date can then be set manually.
locked_setting_tooltip: This setting is locked because it affects the numbering of documents. It can only be changed at the turn of the year, when the numbering is reset.
order_number: If the order has not been committed, it has a provisional order number with the suffix v.
order_days: Harvest, washing, cleaning and commissioning day for this order. When they differ from the reseller's defaults they are highlighted in red. They can no longer be changed once the order has been created.
delivery_note_number: If the delivery note is not finalized, it has a provisional number with the suffix v.
invoice_number: If the invoice is not finalized, it has a provisional number with the suffix v.
order_note: This note reappears in the commissioning list.
variations_totals_packing_list_boxes: Total number of boxes to pack in the packing list; if there are composite boxes (e.g. L = S+M), only M-boxes and S-boxes count is shown here.
final_column_harvest_share_planning: Approved rows appear on the member pages as information about what is in the crate this week.
available_pu_offers: Available packaging units (PU) are calculated from the harvest forecast, minus the demand already planned for shares. For each offer group, the total amount is displayed here.
negative_amounts_in_current_stock: Negative amounts are deliberately not hidden or set to 0, as they can provide important information about data quality. They can indicate, for example, that theoretical harvests or purchases were not recorded correctly.
use_personalized_offers: When this option is activated, offers will be issued with the reseller's address.
create_invoice_for_selected: If there are already finalized invoices among the selected delivery notes, this button remains disabled.
is_active_description: Entries can only be deleted if they have not been used anywhere yet. Otherwise they can be deactivated here.
price_per_unit_share_content: If prices are stored for the articles, they will be displayed here. However, they can also be overwritten here.
kg_per_piece_share_content: If stored for the articles, the average piece weight is displayed here. However, it can also be overwritten here.
sort_order: This determines the order in which variations are displayed during planning. S, M, L or L, M, S etc.
washing_checkbox: Must be specified so the washing list can be filled in correctly. Does not appear on the offer.
cleaning_checkbox: Must be specified so the list of vegetables to be cleaned can be filled in correctly. Does not appear on the offer.
delivery_note_creation: Creates a delivery note from this order
explainer_csv_upload: Upload a CSV file for bulk import. Download the template first.
harvesting_crate_forecast: Forecast of crates to be harvested
hash_consent_documents: Hash of the imported consent texts — changes invalidate old consents.
is_packed_bulk: If active, the article is dispensed loose (not pre-packed).
must_be_subscribed_to: Requires that another variant is subscribed.
needs_complex_planning: On: weekly-changing planning like harvest shares. Off: simple, constant planning — set once, applies across all weeks.
price_sum_articles: Sum of the article prices (for plausibility check).
solidarity_min_price: The lowest price a member may choose under solidarity pricing. Empty = the reference price is the floor.
auto_renewal: If active, the subscription automatically renews at the end of the term.
bulk_renew_abos: Renews the selected subscriptions: creates unconfirmed renewal drafts for the next term (same logic as auto-renewal). Non-renewable rows are skipped with a reason.
requires_optin: If active, each delivery is individually confirmed or skipped before its deadline.
optin_deadline_days_before_delivery: How many days before delivery the switch locks. 3 = „until Wednesday for the Saturday crate“.
peak_occupancy: Highest occupancy in any current or future week (confirmed deliveries + active reservations). Capacity cannot be set below this.
entry_date: The entry date is set automatically when the member is approved.
finalize: This has no effect in the app. It only serves to show that whoever made the entries here considers them complete.
is_additional_share_type: Not packed separately, but added to another share, e.g. packed together with a harvest share.
open_members: Use this button to filter for members who have not yet been confirmed.
percentage_added_to_commissioning_list_p: % added to the quantities provided to the packing stations, for waste, etc.
percentage_bulk_packing_list: % added to the packing list, for shares delivered in bulk.
short_name_share_type: Readable abbreviation, e.g. 'Honey' for a honey share, max. 6 letters.
